calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-02-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Plaintiff, Suresh Chhipwadia present with counsel, Daniel Piccinini.
Defendants, David William and John McLain present in pro per.
Counsel and parties met in chambers.
Parites reached a stipulated written settlement, terms were read into the record in open court.
